title: Bumble Inc. (BMBL) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Bumble Inc reported Q3 2024 results where the company beat analyst estimates on both earnings and revenues. Bumble reported quarterly earnings of $0.35 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.20 per share. Total revenue was $274 million, which also beat analyst estimates. However, the revenue declined 1% year-over-year, indicating a challenging growth environment. Total paying users grew 11% to 4.3 million, demonstrating continued user base expansion. However, total ARPPU (average revenue per paying user) declined 10% to $21.17, reflecting ongoing monetization challenges across the platform. The company took a significant noncash impairment charge related to intangible assets and goodwill, resulting in a GAAP net loss of $849 million. However, adjusted EBITDA metrics were strong at $83 million with 30% margins, up 290 basis points year-over-year. The company repurchased $90 million in stock in Q3, demonstrating continued commitment to shareholder returns. Strong adjusted EBITDA margins indicate the company is successfully managing costs despite revenue headwinds.
